purpose: Register prior GPT conversation exports as local thread-source intake material without promoting their contents to source-extracted or checked status.
non_promotion_rule: Conversation exports may contain important equations and generated arguments, but they are not source-extracted claims, theorem proofs, or validator results. Extracted items must be separately bound to source papers, repo rows, or check targets before promotion.
